rows.source_ref: jamesagnew, '144 x 77 ema and 77 ema method', ForexFactory thread 1323194 (2 posts, complete), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1323194
rows.concept: In the direction of the 77-EMA vs 144-EMA(shift 77) trend, enter pullbacks that touch the 77 EMA, targeting the prior swing extreme with a 1:1 stop.
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic EMA-pullback trend-follower on FX majors M15; pure-MQL5 implementable, no ML, has a 1:1 stop, FTMO/DXZ-compatible.
rows.notes: Low-reputability 3-post forum thread, poster calls it a 'new idea' (unverified). Generic EMA-pullback trend-follower (yet another MA system, critiqued in-thread by flashpaul). Needs fixed params for swing-target lookback and the '144 EMA shift 77' semantics before build. flashpaul's alt suggestion (M1/M5, EMA 144/89, session-open windows) depends on proprietary indicators (I-Session, MA MTF Display nmc, M-candle) and is too vague to implement separately.
